name: Constant Interest Rate Accrual Election

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must make an irrevocable election with respect to a specific obligation to use yield-to-maturity compounding instead of straight-line ratable accrual.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to elect to accrue acquisition discount on short-term obligations using a constant interest rate (compounding daily) instead of the default ratable accrual method.
